subcodes.first_line: O spiritual assembly! Praise be to God that ye are luminous even as candles and verdant and flourishing like unto trees [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمع روحانیان الحمد لله مانند شمع روشنید و بمثابه درختان سبز و خرم در
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
